description_long: This is a pair of scissors featuring two distinctively colored handles, one green and one red, made from molded plastic. The handles are asymmetrical, with the red loop being larger and more oval-shaped, likely intended for multiple fingers, while the green loop is smaller and rounder for the thumb. The blades are metallic, straight-edged, and converge to a sharp, pointed tip, suitable for precision cutting. The joint connecting the blades is not prominently visible, suggesting a flush rivet or screw mechanism. The surface of the handles appears smooth and slightly matte, while the blades have a metallic sheen. No visible brand markings or logos are present on the handles or blades.
description: A pair of scissors with green and red plastic handles and sharp, pointed metal blades. The handles are asymmetrical, with a larger red loop and a smaller green loop.
description_view_0: Front view showing both colored handles and the full length of the blades, with the red handle on the right and green on the left.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the thinness of the blades and the overlapping handles, with the red handle on top.
description_view_2: Rear angled view focusing on the open finger loops, with the red handle in the foreground and the green handle behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile with the green handle on top and the full blade length visible.
attribute_handle_type: Asymmetrical, ergonomic handles with one larger oval red loop and one smaller round green loop, designed for right-handed use; smooth plastic with no visible padding or special grip.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Flush rivet or screw joint, not prominently visible, likely non-adjustable.
attribute_finger_loop_design: One large oval loop (red) for multiple fingers and one smaller round loop (green) for the thumb; no soft inserts or textured surfaces.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed tip, designed for precision cutting.
